title: IBM AI Developer Professional Certificate
description: The IBM AI Developer Professional Certificate is an in-depth program designed to equip you with the essential skills and knowledge to excel in the field of artificial intelligence (AI). This course is ideal for those looking to deepen their understanding of AI development, covering both theoretical and practical aspects.

title: FIGMA ESSENTIAL/ADVANCED
description: The Figma Essential/Advanced course on LinkedIn Learning is designed to provide both beginners and experienced designers with a comprehensive understanding of Figma, a powerful web-based UI/UX design tool. This course covers everything from the fundamentals to advanced techniques, ensuring you can create professional and polished designs.

title: Full Stack Web Development
description: This course provided comprehensive training in full stack web development, covering both front-end and back-end technologies. Students gained hands-on experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and various frameworks and tools necessary for building modern web applications.

title: PhD research fellow
description: I am dedicated to research in topics related to electronic engineering, blending areas such as computing, physics, and mathematics in the search for novel materials for optoelectronics.
